headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Intl Flavors & Fragrances, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Intl Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $80 to $90.
